contracts.name: ab_compare_reducer
contracts.description: Collects inference results for a correlation_id, calculates costs from registry pricing, and emits the completed comparison.

contracts.name: node_adr_draft_generation_compute
contracts.description: Deterministic ADR markdown renderer. Accepts a ModelDecisionExtraction and produces a fully-formed ADR draft with no LLM calls. Same input always produces identical output — required for extraction quality measurement.

contracts.name: node_agent_coordinator_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node for cross-agent memory coordination. Manages subscriptions and publishes notification events to Kafka for subscriber consumption.

contracts.name: aislop_sweep
contracts.description: Detect AI-generated quality anti-patterns across repos. Scans for phantom callables, backwards-compat shims, prohibited env var patterns, hardcoded topic strings, agent-left TODO/FIXME markers, and empty implementations.

contracts.name: node_architectural_invariant_loop
contracts.description: Convert architectural principles into typed invariant contracts and enforce them across multiple surfaces. Loads seed invariant YAML contracts, evaluates them against a target scope, and reports violations with waiver-aware suppression semantics.

contracts.name: node_audit_trail_compactor
contracts.description: Daily rollup of .onex_state/friction/ + dispatch-log ndjson. Produces top failure modes, recurring tickets, and stall heatmap. Optionally writes a markdown rollup to docs/audit-rollups/.

contracts.name: baseline_capture
contracts.description: Captures a named snapshot of system state as a baseline artifact. Runs configurable probes (GitHub PRs, Linear tickets, service health, Kafka topics, git branches, DB row counts) and writes a JSON artifact to .onex_state/baselines/. Used as the "before" measurement in any workflow.

contracts.name: baseline_compare
contracts.description: Diffs current system state against a previously captured baseline artifact. Loads the named baseline from .onex_state/baselines/, re-runs the same probes to capture current state, computes per-probe deltas, and writes a delta JSON artifact. Used as the "after" measurement in any workflow.

contracts.name: node_budget_policy_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic budget policy evaluator. Compares context usage (tokens, cost, elapsed time) against declared thresholds and returns an EnumBudgetAction forcing decision. No side effects, no I/O, no bus or DB dependencies.

contracts.name: build_loop
contracts.description: Deterministic build loop WorkflowPackage. Coordinates the 6-phase autonomous build loop cycle as a pure FSM state machine. Phases: IDLE -> CLOSING_OUT -> VERIFYING -> FILLING -> CLASSIFYING -> BUILDING -> COMPLETE. Circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures.

contracts.name: node_bus_audit_compute
contracts.description: Audits event bus topic registry declarations against node contract event_bus wiring. The node is a deterministic static compute surface; live Kafka sampling belongs in a future effect node.

contracts.name: canary_score_reducer
contracts.description: Subscribes to canary-completed events and materializes grading scores (recall, precision, fidelity, format_compliance) into the capability_scores table, closing the feedback loop between canary runs and routing decisions.

contracts.name: node_candidate_pool_compute
contracts.description: Bootstrap-grade multi-candidate selection. Scores N generated outputs against JSON schema validity and LOC budget constraints. Pure, deterministic — same input always produces identical output. No LLM calls, no I/O.

contracts.name: node_chain_diff
contracts.description: Pure chain comparison node. Accepts an expected golden chain and an observed event chain and returns a detailed diff with missing events, unexpected events, order mismatches, and topic mismatches. No I/O, no side effects.

contracts.name: node_chain_diff_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic comparison of expected and observed golden-chain event entries. The node performs no I/O and owns no runtime state.

contracts.name: node_changelog_audit_compute
contracts.description: Fetch, parse, and classify changelogs for a set of repositories since a given date. Pure compute transform — no network I/O; caller supplies raw changelog content. STUB — not yet implemented. Returns SkillRoutingError with reason node_not_implemented.

contracts.name: node_checkpoint_compute
contracts.description: Pure state serialization/deserialization for session checkpoints. Supports save, load, and list operations over checkpoint data. STUB — not yet implemented. Returns SkillRoutingError with reason node_not_implemented.

contracts.name: ci_watch
contracts.description: CI watch WorkflowPackage. Polls GitHub Actions for a PR's CI status, classifies the terminal state (passed, failed, fixed, unfixable), and emits a completion event with failure details. When auto_fix=true, dispatches a fixer worker on failures and re-polls after each cycle up to max_fix_cycles times.

contracts.name: claim_resolver
contracts.description: Resolver-backed verification node for agent turn side-effect claims emitted by omniclaude hooks. It verifies concrete GitHub/Git claims, returns structured mismatches, and treats blocker_on_X claims without quoted gh pr view --json evidence as failures.

contracts.name: close_out
contracts.description: Close-out pipeline WorkflowPackage. Coordinates the multi-phase end-of-day close-out workflow. Phase order mirrors omniclaude/scripts/closeout-phase-contract.yaml phases whose category is not "build". Circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures.

contracts.name: node_closeout_verifier_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic closeout verifier. It compares expected and observed chains, checks declared evidence kinds, requires verifier identity, and returns a shared ModelCloseoutResult. Upstream effects are responsible for reading files or capturing runtime evidence.

contracts.name: node_code_embedding_effect
contracts.description:
Consumes code-entities-extracted.v1 events, generates vector embeddings
via a contract-configured embedding model endpoint, and upserts vectors
into the Qdrant code_patterns collection. Emits code-embedded.v1 upon
successful batch completion.

Embedding uses tiered fields:
  Primary (stable, source-derived): entity_name, signature, docstring
  Secondary (optional, LLM-enriched): llm_description

Point ID = entity UUID (upsert is idempotent).
Qdrant unavailability is a graceful skip — logged as warning, not error.

contracts.name: node_code_enrichment_effect
contracts.description:
Enriches code entities with LLM-generated classification, description, and
architectural pattern. Uses contract-driven model routing: local .201 Qwen3-Coder
first (LLM_CODER_URL), Claude fallback if unreachable (LLM_FALLBACK_URL).
Updates Postgres code_entities table via injected repository.
Emits code-enriched.v1 upon batch completion.

Invariants (from OMN-5664 + Invariant S5):
  - Low confidence (<0.7) → stored as "other", never forced to an archetype label.
  - LLM failure is non-fatal: entity stays unenriched, retried on next run.
  - enrichment_version tracks which pass touched the entity.
  - No hardcoded model IDs, no hardcoded IP addresses.
  - correlation_id required on both input and output.

contracts.name: coderabbit_triage
contracts.description: CodeRabbit thread triage WorkflowPackage. Lists all CodeRabbit review threads on a PR, classifies each as BLOCKING or SUGGESTION using a hardcoded keyword list (no LLM), and emits a completion event with the classification summary. BLOCKING threads require manual fix before merge. SUGGESTION threads are safe to auto-acknowledge.

contracts.name: compliance_sweep
contracts.description: Handler contract compliance sweep — scans repos for imperative handlers that bypass the ONEX contract system, detects hardcoded topics, undeclared transports, missing handler routing, logic-in-node, and wire schema mismatches.

contracts.name: node_context_bundle_generator_compute
contracts.description: Builds a ModelContextBundle at the requested level (L0-L4) from task state and run context. Pure deterministic extraction — no I/O, no LLM calls. Same inputs always produce identical output.

contracts.name: node_context_experiment_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic compute node that assembles ModelContextPackExtended instances for context-factor experimentation. Given a task, model ID, and a set of factor subsets, returns an ordered pack per subset for comparison. No I/O; all context artifacts are caller-supplied.

contracts.name: node_context_pack_builder_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic assembly of ModelContextPack from resolved context artifacts and a validated context profile. The node performs no I/O and treats cache hits as external advisory metadata, not compute truth.

contracts.name: node_contract_drift_compute
contracts.description: Compute cross-repo contract drift by hashing all contracts against pinned baselines and classifying field-level changes as BREAKING, ADDITIVE, or NON_BREAKING. Also validates Kafka boundary parity from kafka_boundaries.yaml. Pure compute node — no external I/O, no LLM calls.

contracts.name: node_contract_reducer
contracts.description: Generic contract-driven state machine reducer. Accepts accumulated state, a user response, and a transition table declared in the calling contract. Evaluates the transition, merges any state updates, advances current_step, and reports whether the flow is terminal. Pure compute — no I/O.

contracts.name: contract_sweep
contracts.description: Contract compliance sweep — validates all node contract.yaml files across repos for required fields, valid topic naming, handler module references, and schema adherence. Reports violations by severity.

contracts.name: coverage_sweep
contracts.description: Measure test coverage across Python repos, flag modules below threshold, identify zero-coverage blind spots, and prioritize gaps by recency and severity.

contracts.name: node_create_ticket
contracts.description: Create a single Linear ticket from args, contract file, or plan milestone with conflict resolution and ModelTicketContract generation.

contracts.name: cross_cli_originator
contracts.description: Shared CLI entry point invoked by opencode/codex plugins. Accepts a delegation prompt, builds a delegation envelope, and publishes it to the event bus. Thin wrapper — no orchestration logic, no direct handler imports.

contracts.name: data_flow_sweep
contracts.description: End-to-end data flow verification — for each topic, verify producer status, consumer lag, DB table row counts, and field mapping correctness across the entire Kafka-to-DB-to-dashboard pipeline.

contracts.name: data_verification
contracts.description: Post-pipeline data verification compute node. Queries sample rows from a target table, runs deterministic data quality checks (garbage UUIDs, null required fields, duplicates, row count, schema match), and emits a structured pass/fail result. Replaces manual investigation with an automated deterministic check.

contracts.name: database_sweep
contracts.description: Projection table health and migration tracking — checks row count and staleness for every table in omnidash_analytics, plus migration state across all ONEX databases (Alembic + Drizzle). Reports HEALTHY/STALE/EMPTY/MISSING/ORPHAN/UNKNOWN status per table and CURRENT/PENDING/AHEAD/FAILED/NO_TABLE per database. Supports per-table staleness thresholds with fallback to a global default.

contracts.name: node_delegate_skill_orchestrator
contracts.description: Consumer-facing delegation entry point for Claude Code and Codex adapters. Accepts typed delegation requests, validates task type, normalizes input, dispatches to the omnibase_infra delegation runtime, and returns typed results. Owns the user-facing delegation contract.

contracts.name: node_delegation_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node that coordinates delegation through a correlation_id-keyed FSM: receive delegation request, invoke routing reducer, dispatch typed invocation commands to the selected effect lane, react to remote agent lifecycle events or the legacy inference and quality-gate path, then emit delegation-completed or delegation-failed. As of 0.2.0 (OMN-10792), exposes HandlerComplianceLoop as an in-process helper. As of 0.3.0 (OMN-10794), HandlerDelegationWorkflow invokes the loop per inference attempt when ModelDelegationRequest sets ``output_schema_key`` + ``compliance_budget``: validation failure with budget CONTINUE emits a fresh repair-prompt ModelInferenceIntent and stays in ROUTED (self-loop); compliant or budget ABORT forwards to the quality gate. tokens_to_compliance + compliance_attempts are accumulated across attempts and forwarded onto the terminal ModelDelegationResult and ModelTaskDelegatedEvent.

contracts.name: node_delegation_quality_gate_reducer
contracts.description:
Deterministic quality gate reducer for the delegation pipeline. Evaluates LLM output quality using DoD checks declared in the task-class contract: deterministic checks (output_parses, signature_preserved) BLOCK delegation result injection on failure (fail_category="fail_deterministic"); heuristic checks (no_refusal, min_length_chars, etc.) carry the legacy semantics. Reads dod_deterministic and dod_heuristic from ModelQualityGateInput (OMN-10616). Pure function, no I/O.
Failure categories: REFUSAL, MALFORMED, WEAK_OUTPUT, TASK_MISMATCH, FAIL_DETERMINISTIC.

contracts.name: node_delegation_routing_feedback_reducer
contracts.description: Routing feedback reducer for the delegation pipeline. Consumes delegation terminal events (completed, escalation-triggered, all-tiers-failed) and accumulates per-(model_id, task_type) counters. Materializes a ModelRoutingFeedback projection that downstream routing reducers can use to skip models with poor success rates.

contracts.name: node_delegation_routing_reducer
contracts.description: Deterministic routing reducer for the delegation pipeline. Maps task type and prompt token count to a routing decision: which model, endpoint, cost tier, and system prompt to use. Performs read-only configuration I/O to load on-disk contracts (overrideable via BIFROST_CONTRACT_PATH, BIFROST_OVERLAY_PATH, and TASK_CLASS_CONTRACT_PATH). Resolves endpoint URLs by deep-merging the repo default bifrost contract with the user endpoint overlay — not from endpoint environment variables (OMN-10657, OMN-10717). Loads task-class contracts from configs/task_class_contracts.v1.yaml (overrideable via TASK_CLASS_CONTRACT_PATH) and enforces per-task-class cloud_routing_policy, pricing_ceiling_per_1k_tokens, and escalation_policy.tier_order constraints (OMN-10615).

contracts.name: node_demo_cost_compute
contracts.description: Demo cost compute node. Accepts per-model inference results with token counts, applies per-model pricing tables, and returns costs per model plus the cheapest model identifier. Pure, deterministic, no LLM calls, no I/O.

contracts.name: demo_drift_detector
contracts.description: Diffs current demo state vs a proof-of-green rehearsal bundle. Uses truth hierarchy: topology > projection > dashboard > screenshots. Classifies each finding with a demo-criticality rubric and writes drift_report.json to the evidence directory.

contracts.name: node_design_plan_context_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic assembly of architecture context for the design-to-plan workflow. Given a plan topic and pre-resolved query results (Repowise architectural decisions, antipattern entries, and Memgraph dependency impact), produces a structured Architecture Context block with four sections: Systems affected, Architecture decisions to honor, Antipatterns to avoid, and Dependency impact. The node performs no I/O; all query results are injected by the caller.

contracts.name: node_dispatch_queue_drainer
contracts.description: Compile one legacy .onex_state/dispatch_queue YAML item through node_dispatch_worker without spawning agents or moving queue files.

contracts.name: node_dispatch_worker
contracts.description:
Validate and compile a worker dispatch spec into a role-templated agent prompt. Pure prep — reads TaskList state, validates inputs, compiles role templates with collision fences, and returns structured spawn args. Does NOT call Agent(), TaskCreate, or any external APIs.
When knowledge_context_level is set (L0–L3), the handler assembles a KB context bundle and injects it as a ## Knowledge Context section before returning.

contracts.name: doc_freshness_sweep
contracts.description: Scan documentation files across ONEX platform repos for broken references, stale content, and CLAUDE.md accuracy. Delegates to onex_change_control scanners for reference extraction, resolution, and staleness scoring.

contracts.name: node_dod_sweep_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates targeted DoD sweep receipt generation for tickets.

contracts.name: dod_verify
contracts.description: DoD evidence verification compute node. Loads a ticket contract, runs evidence checks against it, and emits a structured verification report. Simple single-shot computation, not a multi-phase FSM.

contracts.name: duplication_sweep
contracts.description: Detect duplicate definitions across repos: Drizzle table names in omnidash schemas (D1), Kafka topic registration conflicts between omniclaude TopicBase and kafka_boundaries.yaml (D2), migration prefix collisions via check-migration-conflicts (D3), and cross-repo Pydantic model name collisions in production code (D4).

contracts.name: emit_daemon
contracts.description: Self-healing portable event publishing daemon. Accepts events via Unix domain socket, validates against a pluggable per-platform event registry, queues with disk spool durability, and publishes to Kafka with circuit breaker protection. Health endpoint responds within 100ms and never hangs.

contracts.name: node_env_parity_compute
contracts.description: Computes environment parity between local and deployed runtime. STUB — not yet implemented. Returns SkillRoutingError with reason node_not_implemented.

contracts.name: environment_health_scanner
contracts.description: Live environment health scanner — reads contracts to know what should exist, probes the running environment to verify it does, and emits a structured PASS/WARN/FAIL report per subsystem.

contracts.name: node_feature_dashboard_compute
contracts.description: Pure skill connectivity audit across 8 layers of the platform. Checks that each skill in the given filter set is wired through all required layers and reports coverage gaps. STUB — not yet implemented. Returns SkillRoutingError with reason node_not_implemented.

contracts.name: node_finding_aggregator_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: merges findings from N models via weighted-union dedup (Jaccard similarity).

contracts.name: fixer_dispatcher
contracts.description: Routes PR stall events to the correct fixer node. Pure compute — all routing is table-driven with zero network calls. Dispatches to ci_fix_effect (RED), conflict_hunk_effect (CONFLICTED), rebase_effect (BEHIND), or emits deploy-gate advisory. Unknown categories escalate.

contracts.name: full_triage_orchestrator
contracts.description: Unified read-only diagnosis orchestrator. Parallel-invokes every read-only sweep plus 3 new probes (Infisical reachability, LLM endpoint map, launchd tick bundle health). Aggregates findings into a single ranked report by severity x blast_radius + freshness. Pure diagnostics — mutates nothing.

contracts.name: node_gap_compute
contracts.description: Computes deterministic integration gaps from repo-local contracts and typed report artifacts. Live service probes and destructive fixes are explicit follow-on effect surfaces, not silent fallbacks.

contracts.name: node_golden_chain_generator
contracts.description: Derives the expected golden chain from contract topology (primary) and generated tests (secondary, AST-based). Fully deterministic: same contract + node metadata + declared topology + generated tests + generator/template/profile identity → same chain hash. Dynamic or unresolvable event expectations are emitted as UNKNOWN markers, never guessed.

contracts.name: node_golden_chain_generator_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic derivation of expected golden-chain entries from explicit ticket-contract declarations. Unknown topology is represented as deferred warnings instead of inferred hidden chain entries.

contracts.name: golden_chain_sweep
contracts.description: Validate end-to-end Kafka-to-DB-projection data flow for golden chains. Publishes synthetic events with correlation IDs, polls projection tables for matching rows, and asserts field-level correctness.

contracts.name: node_handler_correctness_gate
contracts.description: Pure compute node that scores pre-computed handler outputs against an eval set and returns pass/fail with a correctness score. The gate itself never invokes the handler — it only compares outputs.

contracts.name: node_insights_to_plan_compute
contracts.description: Parse an HTML insights document, extract structured insights, and produce a prioritised implementation plan with action items. Pure deterministic transform — no LLM calls, same input always yields identical output. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_integration_sweep_orchestrator
contracts.description: Writes deterministic integration sweep artifacts for explicit ticket scopes.

contracts.name: integration_test_runner
contracts.description: Discovers all OmniNode entry points, finds each node's golden chain test module, and re-runs those tests with a configurable DI profile. Local profile uses EventBusInmemory (unit mode). Staging/production profiles swap to EventBusKafka and real clients — the same test code runs against real infrastructure without any test changes.

contracts.name: node_intelligence_reducer
contracts.description: Unified reducer for all intelligence FSMs. Pure reducer with all state stored in PostgreSQL fsm_state table. Handles INGESTION, PATTERN_LEARNING, QUALITY_ASSESSMENT, and PATTERN_LIFECYCLE FSM types via enum routing.

contracts.name: kafka_topic_emit_probe
contracts.description: Emits synthetic events for each declared Kafka topic to verify producers, consumers, and partition health. Runs hourly and validates that consumer groups advance, catching silent failures like EMIT_FAILED.

contracts.name: node_knowledge_context_assembler_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer that collects backend response fragments for a correlation_id and materializes a ModelKnowledgeContextBundle. Handles partial failures: any mix of ok/error fragments produces a valid bundle with COMPLETE, PARTIAL, or DEGRADED status. No I/O — callers own the state.

contracts.name: node_knowledge_health_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic classification of knowledge backend probe results. Receives pre-collected probe data as explicit input and classifies overall health using shared freshness states. Performs no I/O.

contracts.name: node_knowledge_query_federation_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node that federates knowledge queries across three backends (Memgraph, Repowise, Qdrant) using deterministic keyword heuristics. No LLM dependency. Results are merged with provenance tags and deduplicated by content hash. Ambiguous queries fan out to all three backends.

contracts.name: ledger_hash_compute
contracts.description: Ledger demo COMPUTE. Reads journal file, derives sha256 + line count as ModelLedgerHashComputed, and publishes onex.evt.omnimarket.ledger-hash-computed.v1 for the reducer. Part of OMN-8943.

contracts.name: ledger_state_reducer
contracts.description: Ledger demo REDUCER. Pure delta(state, event) -> (new_state, intents). Handler returns dict {"state": ..., "intents": [ModelPersistStateIntent]} per the pure-reducer-as-effect pattern (epic OMN-9006 / OMN-9009). The downstream node_state_persist_effect consumes the intent and performs the ProtocolStateStore.put() side effect — the reducer itself does no I/O.

contracts.name: node_ledger_stats_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic ledger statistics aggregator. Accepts a list of chain event records and returns aggregate stats: total chains, pass/fail counts, per-model pass/fail/avg_attempts breakdown, and ledger hit rate. No I/O, no filesystem access, no side effects. All data is supplied via the request model — the caller is responsible for reading chain files.

contracts.name: node_linear_triage
contracts.description: Scan all non-completed Linear tickets, verify status against actual GitHub PR state, auto-mark merged tickets done, flag stale tickets, and detect completed epics.

contracts.name: node_llm_delegation_projection
contracts.description: Materializes daily aggregate rows from LLM delegation-call-completed events into the llm_delegation_daily_projection table. Replay-safe via idempotency key on correlation_id + causation_id + terminal_event_id. Kafka topic/partition/offset is the authoritative ordering authority.

contracts.name: node_llm_delegation_routing_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node that selects a target LLM model from a routing policy. Takes a DelegationRequest, RoutingPolicy, degradation state, and health state; returns a ModelSelection. Fully deterministic, no I/O.

contracts.name: llm_eval_harness
contracts.description: Benchmark LLM output quality per model and task type against a fixed task corpus. Produces structured eval results that feed the delegation router's scoring system, replacing heuristic seed values once >=20 samples exist.

contracts.name: local_review
contracts.description: Iterative local code review loop WorkflowPackage. Phases: INIT -> REVIEW -> FIX -> COMMIT -> CHECK_CLEAN -> DONE. Loops back from CHECK_CLEAN to REVIEW when issues remain. Requires N consecutive clean runs before completing. Circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures.

contracts.name: log_projection
contracts.description: Projects structured log events from all ONEX handlers into a queryable log store. Enables real-time observability of handler execution without grep-based log searching.

contracts.name: node_loop_state_reducer
contracts.description: FSM-based state tracking for the autonomous build loop with circuit breaker. Pure reducer: delta(state, event) -> (new_state, intents[]).

contracts.name: merge_sweep_compute
contracts.description: Org-wide PR sweep. Classifies open PRs into merge-ready (Track A), thread-resolution (Track A-resolve), and needs-polish (Track B) queues. Enables GitHub auto-merge on ready PRs, resolves review threads, and dispatches polish work on fixable PRs. Tracks cross-run failure history with escalation thresholds (STUCK, CHRONIC, RECIDIVIST).

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_state_reducer
contracts.description: REDUCER node. Consumes ModelSweepOutcomeClassified events, delta-applies to aggregate sweep state. Dedup is first-class: pr_outcomes_by_key is first-writer-wins. Emits exactly-once terminal merge-sweep-completed.v1 event when all PRs accounted for. RuntimeLocal (OMN-8946) persists state via ProtocolStateStore.

contracts.name: model_router
contracts.description: Contract-driven LLM endpoint router. Every LLM call in the platform routes through this node — no hardcoded model IDs, base URLs, or timeout literals in handler source or node contracts. Endpoints are resolved from the runtime model registry via logical model keys declared in the caller's ModelRoutingPolicy.

contracts.name: monitor_alert_responder
contracts.description: Subscribes to onex.evt.omnibase-infra.monitor-alert-detected.v1, classifies alerts into RECOVERABLE / UNKNOWN / ESCALATE tiers, and routes accordingly: RECOVERABLE → dispatches fix agent via playbook; UNKNOWN → emits alert-unhandled event for Slack escalation; ESCALATE → P0 Slack + Linear ticket. Closes the loop on monitor_logs.py dual-emit (OMN-8885).

contracts.name: morning_handoff_generator
contracts.description: Synthesizes overnight demo readiness evidence (rehearsal bundle, drift report, fix dispatch log) into a human-readable summary and machine-readable morning_dispatch_plan.json. Supports replay mode from saved evidence.

contracts.name: node_navigation_history_reducer
contracts.description:
Reduces navigation history events into aggregated session context.
Requires pg_dsn, qdrant, and embedding parameters at runtime.

contracts.name: node_omnigate_projection
contracts.description: Owns OmniGate activity and metrics projection snapshots for dashboard consumers.

contracts.name: node_omnigate_receipt_generator
contracts.description: Generates canonical OmniGate receipts bound to diff hash, config hash, repository authority, and commit SHAs.

contracts.name: node_omnigate_receipt_verifier
contracts.description: Verifies inline OmniGate PR receipts against trusted base config and PR metadata.

contracts.name: node_onboarding
contracts.description: Contract-driven progressive onboarding for new users and employees. Accepts a policy name (new_employee, standalone_quickstart, contributor_local, full_platform) or explicit target_capabilities. Resolves the policy, executes verification for each step, and renders markdown progress output.

contracts.name: node_output_schema_registry_compute
contracts.description: Pure COMPUTE node that resolves a schema key to its Pydantic model JSON schema. Accepts a schema_key string and returns the model_json_schema() dict for the registered Pydantic model. No LLM calls, no I/O — deterministic and side-effect-free.

contracts.name: overseer_benchmarker
contracts.description: Continuous benchmarking harness that extends node_llm_eval_harness. Runs eval tasks through target models and appends scorecard rows to overseer_performance_ledger.jsonl for future routing decisions. Never reads or mutates active overseer run state — append-only side effect.

contracts.name: overseer_observer
contracts.description: Phase-0 stub node declaring SideEffectObserver and EvidenceEvaluator extension points for the overseer pipeline. Records Kafka side effects emitted by nodes (SideEffectObserver) and checks dod_evidence fields against observed outputs (EvidenceEvaluator). No Kafka wiring until Wave 3+.

contracts.name: overseer_verifier
contracts.description: Deterministic verification layer for overseer model outputs. Applies five independent check dimensions synchronously: input_completeness, contract_compliance, allowed_action_scope, invariant_preservation, outcome_success_validation. Returns PASS, FAIL, or ESCALATE. No LLM calls. No I/O side effects.

contracts.name: node_persona_builder_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node that classifies PersonaSignal events into an updated PersonaProfile. Heuristic rules with conservatism to prevent thrashing. No I/O. Migrated from omnimemory.

contracts.name: node_persona_retrieval_effect
contracts.description: Read-only EFFECT node that retrieves the latest PersonaSnapshot for a user_id/agent_id from Postgres. No event bus (read-only). Phase 3 Adaptive Personalization (OMN-7305).

contracts.name: node_plan_audit_compute
contracts.description: Validate a plan YAML file: field presence checks, schema validation, and dependency cycle detection. Produces a per-check pass/fail report with violation details. Pure deterministic transform — no LLM calls. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_plan_to_tickets
contracts.description: Batch create Linear tickets from a plan markdown file. Parses ## Task N: sections, creates/links epic, resolves dependencies, and generates ModelTicketContracts for all tickets.

contracts.name: platform_readiness
contracts.description: Unified platform readiness gate. Aggregates verification dimensions into a tri-state (PASS/WARN/FAIL) report with freshness-aware semantics and valid-zero vs broken-zero distinction.

contracts.name: node_polish_task_classifier
contracts.description: Pure compute: single-action decision table that maps one polish signal to exactly one EnumPolishTaskClass.

contracts.name: pr_health_monitor
contracts.description: Extends the PR snapshot with health classification. Consumes ModelPRInfo objects (from node_pr_snapshot_effect) and classifies each PR as HEALTHY, STALE_RED (CI failing >24h), STALE_INACTIVE (no activity 3+ days), CONFLICTED, or REVIEW_BLOCKED. Produces a structured health report suitable for dashboard ingestion or Linear ticket creation.

contracts.name: node_pr_lifecycle_inventory_compute
contracts.description: Inventory layer of the pr_lifecycle domain — collects raw PR state (status, checks, reviews, conflicts) via gh CLI without classification or action logic.

contracts.name: node_pr_lifecycle_state_reducer
contracts.description: Pure FSM reducer for the PR lifecycle domain. delta(state, event) -> (new_state, intents[]). Entry flags (dry_run, inventory_only, fix_only) control which transitions are enabled. No side effects — only computes state transitions and emits intent events.

contracts.name: node_pr_lifecycle_triage_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: classifies PRs into triage categories (green/red/conflicted/needs_review) from inventory data with zero network calls.

contracts.name: pr_polish
contracts.description: PR readiness polish WorkflowPackage. Resolves merge conflicts, fixes CI failures, addresses review comments, and runs local review. Phases: INIT -> RESOLVE_CONFLICTS -> FIX_CI -> ADDRESS_COMMENTS -> LOCAL_REVIEW -> DONE. Circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures.

contracts.name: process_watchdog
contracts.description: Infrastructure process watchdog compute node. Checks health of critical platform components (emit daemon, Kafka consumers, LLM endpoints, Docker containers) and emits structured health reports. Designed for periodic execution via cron to detect silent failures before they compound.

contracts.name: projection_baselines
contracts.description: Projects baselines-computed events into 4 baselines tables (baselines_snapshots, baselines_comparisons, baselines_recommendations, baselines_retry_counts) as a single transactional unit. Source topic: onex.evt.omnibase-infra.baselines-computed.v1.

contracts.name: node_projection_cost_by_repo
contracts.description: Emits repeatable cost-by-repository snapshots for downstream dashboard consumers.

contracts.name: node_projection_cost_summary
contracts.description: Emits repeatable cost summary snapshots for downstream dashboard consumers.

contracts.name: node_projection_cost_token_usage
contracts.description: Emits repeatable token usage snapshots for downstream dashboard consumers.

contracts.name: projection_delegation
contracts.description: Projects delegation terminal events into the delegation_events table. Dedup by correlation_id. Sources include legacy task-delegated events, shadow comparisons, node generation completions, and delegate-skill terminal events.

contracts.name: node_projection_dep_health
contracts.description: Projects dep-health-sweep-completed events into the dep_health_findings table. Upsert keyed by (run_id, finding_type, file_path, symbol). Idempotent.

contracts.name: projection_llm_cost
contracts.description: Projects llm-call-completed events into the llm_cost_aggregates table. SOW WARN blocker — cost tracking must be operational for budget compliance. Source topic: onex.evt.omniintelligence.llm-call-completed.v1.

contracts.name: projection_llm_routing
contracts.description: Projects llm-routing-decision events into the llm_routing_decisions table. Closes the golden chain routing tail: onex.evt.omniclaude.llm-routing-decision.v1 -> llm_routing_decisions (OMN-11768). UPSERT key: correlation_id.

contracts.name: projection_overnight
contracts.description: Projects overnight session events into the overnight_sessions and overnight_session_phases tables. UPSERT by session_id. Source topics: phase-start.v1, phase-completed.v1, session-completed.v1.

contracts.name: projection_query
contracts.description: Read-only query node exposing 10 dashboard query shapes via HTTP. Omnidash calls this node instead of querying omnidash_analytics directly, enforcing projection-only architecture (OMN-8899).

contracts.name: projection_registration
contracts.description: Projects node introspection and heartbeat events into the node_service_registry table. Source topics: onex.evt.platform.node-introspection.v1 and onex.evt.platform.node-heartbeat.v1. PeriodicHeartbeatEmitter emits heartbeat events every 60s per active node. Nodes not seen for >5 min are transitioned to health_status='stale'.

contracts.name: projection_savings
contracts.description: Projects savings-estimated events into the savings_estimates table. Source topics include omnibase-infra savings estimates and omnimarket delegate-skill terminal events that already carry measured token/cost savings metrics.

contracts.name: projection_session_outcome
contracts.description: Projects session-outcome events into the session_outcomes table. UPSERT by session_id (latest-state-wins). Source topic: onex.evt.omniclaude.session-outcome.v1.

contracts.name: node_recall_compute
contracts.description: Unified knowledge query interface. Federates queries across agent learnings, architecture (Repowise + Memgraph), and antipattern (Qdrant) backends. Replaces the recall skill's direct HTTP calls to localhost:8085 — all retrieval now routes through the event bus as a proper COMPUTE node.

contracts.name: node_release
contracts.description: Org-wide coordinated release pipeline — bumps versions, pins cross-repo deps, creates PRs, merges, tags, and triggers PyPI publish across all OmniNode repos in dependency-tier order.

contracts.name: node_resume_session_compute
contracts.description: Load the projected session state for a given task_id and agent_id. Returns the current phase, progress percentage, and full session state projection. Pure deterministic transform over the event projection — no LLM calls. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_rewind_compute
contracts.description: Query the event stream for a named agent within a timestamp window. Returns all matching events and a summary of actions taken. Pure deterministic projection — no LLM calls, same inputs yield identical output. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_routing_policy_engine
contracts.description: Deterministic model-selection engine. Accepts a task type, capability requirements, available models with scores, and cost constraints; applies exploitation (best eligible model) or exploration (second-best) based on a caller-supplied seed value. No LLM calls, no I/O, same input = same output.

contracts.name: node_rrh_compute
contracts.description: Release Readiness Handshake validator. Evaluates a set of named readiness checks for a given release identifier and produces a per-check pass/fail result with an overall readiness verdict. Pure deterministic transform — no LLM calls. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_rsd_fill_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: selects top-N tickets by RSD score with deterministic tie-break.

contracts.name: runtime_sweep
contracts.description: Runtime registration and wiring verification — checks node descriptions are real, all contract-declared handlers are wired in dispatch, all topics have both producer and consumer, and container logs are free of repeated errors.

contracts.name: node_schema_repair_compute
contracts.description: Deterministic schema repair prompt builder. Accepts malformed LLM output plus Pydantic validation errors and returns a targeted repair prompt for re-dispatch. No LLM calls — pure prompt construction. Same input always produces identical output.

contracts.name: node_semantic_analyzer_compute
contracts.description: Semantic analysis compute node: embedding generation, entity extraction, and full analysis. Delegates I/O to ProtocolEmbeddingProvider/ProtocolLLMProvider. Implementation re-exported from omnimemory. Migrated OMN-8297.

contracts.name: node_semantic_antipattern_classifier_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic antipattern violation classifier. Receives candidate matches from node_antipattern_match_effect (Qdrant lookup) as explicit input and classifies them into blocking or advisory violations. No network, no file I/O. Same input always produces same output.

contracts.name: node_session_compose
contracts.description: Session compose orchestrator — composes session phases into a single execution. Supports dry_run mode (returns a dry_run plan) and live dispatch mode (currently returns a 'dispatched' placeholder for each phase; real dispatch wiring is follow-up work).

contracts.name: node_session_phase_evaluator
contracts.description: Pure deterministic session phase evaluator. Receives current phase state and session contract; computes budget elapsed percentage and checks exit conditions. Returns a ModelPhaseEvaluation action with no side effects, no I/O, no bus or DB dependencies.

contracts.name: node_session_phase_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer that materializes canonical session phase state from events. delta(state, event) -> new_state. Writes phase_state.yaml for hook consumption. REDUCER nodes return projections[] only — no events, intents, or result.

contracts.name: session_post_mortem
contracts.description: Session post-mortem collector. Collects planned vs completed phases, stalled agents, friction events, PR status, and carry-forward items. Produces ModelPostMortemReport. Writes to docs/post-mortems/ and emits session-post-mortem event. Runs LAST each evening.

contracts.name: node_similarity_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node for vector similarity calculations. Supports cosine and euclidean distance metrics with optional threshold matching. No I/O operations. Migrated from omnimemory.

contracts.name: node_skill_dispatch_engine_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node for the dispatch_engine skill. Polls the work backlog and dispatches builders for gaps. Scaffold only: live dispatch returns a "dispatched" string placeholder — real dispatch wiring is follow-up work. Subscribes to command events, emits outcome events on success or failure.

contracts.name: node_skill_functional_audit_compute
contracts.description: Stub detection and connectivity checks across registered skills. Identifies skills with unimplemented handlers, missing contracts, broken wiring, or unreachable dispatch paths. Returns per-skill verdicts and a gap summary. Pure deterministic static analysis — no LLM calls. STUB — not yet implemented.

contracts.name: node_skill_overseer_verify_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node for the overseer_verify skill. Run the deterministic overseer verification gate against a ticket or PR Dispatches skill invocations to the polymorphic agent via the shared handle_skill_requested handler. Subscribes to command events, emits outcome events on success or failure.

contracts.name: node_swarm_aggregator_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node for swarm result aggregation. Concatenates subtask outputs into a unified response. For synthesis mode, receives pre-fetched synthesis LLM output as explicit input. Never calls an LLM directly.

contracts.name: node_swarm_decomposer_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node for swarm task decomposition. Parses pre-fetched planner LLM output into typed subtasks with validation. Never calls an LLM directly.

contracts.name: node_swarm_fanout_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator node for swarm parallel fan-out dispatch. Publishes N delegation-execute commands (one per subtask) to onex.cmd.omnimarket.delegation-execute.v1, then collects completion events by correlation_id. All inference I/O is handled by node_llm_delegation_call_effect. This node owns only coordination.

contracts.name: node_swarm_registry_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node for swarm endpoint selection. Matches subtasks to available endpoints based on affinity, capability, and health status. Deterministic: same inputs produce same assignments.

contracts.name: node_swarm_subtask_state_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer that materializes per-subtask lifecycle state from delegation events. delta(state, event) -> (new_state, projection_applied_event). Idempotent: replaying the same terminal event produces the same state with no duplicate transitions. Ordering authority is topic/partition/offset, not timestamps.

contracts.name: node_sweep_outcome_classify
contracts.description: Pure COMPUTE node. Classifies per-PR completion events from all 3 effect topics into 6 outcome buckets: MERGED | ARMED | REBASED | CI_RERUN_TRIGGERED | FAILED | STUCK. No side effects, no env reads, no I/O.

contracts.name: node_test_generator
contracts.description: Deterministic COMPUTE node. Takes a ticket contract and generates Python test source code from it. Same contract + same generator_version + same template_hash + same generation_profile_hash always produces the same test_hash. Part of the Context Pack Pipeline (OMN-11674).

contracts.name: node_test_generator_compute
contracts.description: Pure deterministic generation of parser-valid pytest artifacts from a ModelTicketContract. The node writes no files and executes no tests; effect nodes own persistence and runtime execution.

contracts.name: node_ticket_classify_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: classifies tickets using keyword heuristics into buildability categories.

contracts.name: ticket_pipeline
contracts.description: Per-ticket execution pipeline WorkflowPackage. This first market-owned slice executes PRE_FLIGHT deterministically, compiles an IMPLEMENT dispatch-worker prompt without spawning an agent, and blocks later side-effect phases as not implemented until they are explicitly wired.

contracts.name: node_ticket_plan_compute
contracts.description: Pure transform that parses a plan markdown document and produces a structured list of Linear ticket definitions. No Linear API calls — caller supplies raw plan text and receives ticket specs. STUB — not yet implemented. Returns SkillRoutingError with reason node_not_implemented.

contracts.name: node_ticket_research_enrichment_compute
contracts.description: Queries the knowledge context assembler during ticket-work RESEARCH phase. Writes assembled context to .onex_state/knowledge-context/<ticket_id>.md for audit. Timeout > context_timeout_s causes non-blocking TIMEOUT result so research proceeds.

contracts.name: node_ticket_work
contracts.description: Contract-driven ticket execution with Linear integration. Orchestrates intake, research, questions, spec, implementation, review, and done phases with explicit human gates.

contracts.name: node_two_strike_arbiter
contracts.description: Two-strike diagnosis arbiter. Monitors fix attempts per ticket/PR. After 2 consecutive failures: writes docs/diagnosis-*.md, moves Linear ticket to Blocked, and files a friction event for session post-mortem.

contracts.name: verification_receipt_generator
contracts.description: Generates evidence receipts for task-completed claims. Verifies CI checks via gh pr checks and/or runs pytest in the worktree. Returns a structured receipt with per-dimension evidence. Feeds overseer-verify with real evidence — kills rubber-stamping at the source.

contracts.name: version_skew_detector
contracts.description: Detects plugin/runtime version incompatibility across the OmniNode platform. Compares plugin version against runtime version and checks each installed node's version against runtime compatibility range. Emits a version-skew-detected event when incompatibility is found.

contracts.name: node_architecture_validator
contracts.description: COMPUTE node for validating ONEX architecture patterns. Analyzes Python source code and module structures to detect architecture violations. Validates three core rules: ARCH-001 (no direct handler dispatch), ARCH-002 (no handler publishing events), and ARCH-003 (no workflow FSM in orchestrators duplicating reducer transitions). Returns a structured validation result with violations grouped by rule and severity.

contracts.name: node_artifact_change_detector_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that detects artifact-relevant code changes from three surfaces: GitHub PR webhook events, watchdog-based contract file system events, and manual reconcile commands from the CLI. Emits ModelUpdateTrigger events to onex.evt.artifact.change-detected.v1 for downstream impact analysis.

contracts.name: node_artifact_reconciliation_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator for the artifact reconciliation pipeline. Consumes artifact update plans from the REDUCER node, posts PR comments via HandlerPlanToPRComment (for PR-triggered plans only), and emits YAML plan events via HandlerPlanToYaml. Drives the post_pr_comment -> emit_yaml_plan workflow.

contracts.name: node_auth_gate_compute
contracts.description: Pure COMPUTE node for work authorization decisions. Evaluates a 10-step cascade: whitelisted paths, emergency overrides, run_id validation, authorization scope checks (tools, paths, repos), and expiry. Returns allow/deny/soft_deny with reason codes. No I/O, no side effects.

contracts.name: node_baseline_capture
contracts.description: EFFECT node: raw measurement capture for baselines pipeline (SOW Phase 2 — Track B4a). Reads existing pattern execution data (tokens, latency, success status) from agent_actions. Emits onex.evt.omnibase-infra.baselines-computed.v1 with raw measurements so the omnidash consumer can project to baselines_snapshots. Does NOT compute deltas or ROI — that is deferred to B4b.

contracts.name: node_baseline_comparison_compute
contracts.description: Compute node for A/B baseline comparison. Takes paired baseline and candidate run results and computes cost deltas (token, time, retry savings), outcome deltas (quality improvement), and overall ROI determination. Produces a ModelAttributionRecord for promotion decisions at Tier 2+.

contracts.name: node_baselines_batch_compute
contracts.description: EFFECT node: 3-phase baselines batch computation. Derives treatment/control comparison data from agent_routing_decisions and agent_actions tables. Emits onex.evt.omnibase-infra.baselines-computed.v1 for omnidash Baselines dashboard when rows are written (D5: no emit on zero rows).

contracts.name: node_build_loop_projection_compute
contracts.description: Subscribes to onex.evt.omnimarket.build-loop-orchestrator-completed.v1 and projects each terminal event into a ModelPayloadBuildLoopAppend intent for NodeBuildLoopWriteEffect to persist into the build_loop_runs append-only audit table. Uses consumer_purpose="audit" and auto_offset_reset="earliest" so retried or replayed terminal events are captured rather than silently swallowed. Mirrors the canonical node_ledger_projection_compute pattern.

contracts.name: node_build_loop_write_effect
contracts.description: Capability-oriented EFFECT node for build_loop terminal-event persistence. Consumes ModelPayloadBuildLoopAppend intents and INSERTs one row per intent into the public.build_loop_runs append-only audit table. There is no idempotency key — retried terminal events surface as duplicate rows so duplication is observable rather than silently swallowed.

contracts.name: node_chain_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates the prompt-chain learning workflow: receive command, dispatch chain retrieval, evaluate hit/miss, dispatch replay or explore, verify contract, store verified chain.

contracts.name: node_chain_replay_compute
contracts.description: Compute node that takes a cached chain and new prompt context, then adapts the chain steps via variable substitution and context adjustment. Returns adapted steps with a confidence score.

contracts.name: node_chain_retrieval_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that embeds an incoming prompt via the LLM embedding endpoint and queries the Qdrant onex_chain_trajectories collection for similar verified chains by cosine similarity.

contracts.name: node_chain_store_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that stores a verified chain trajectory and its prompt embedding to the Qdrant onex_chain_trajectories collection for future retrieval.

contracts.name: node_chain_verify_reducer
contracts.description: FSM-based state tracking for the chain learning workflow. Tracks the verification lifecycle: pending, retrieving, replaying/exploring, verifying, complete/fallback/failed.

contracts.name: node_checkpoint_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node that owns all filesystem I/O for pipeline checkpoint persistence. Supports write, read, and list operations on checkpoint YAML files stored under ~/.claude/checkpoints/{ticket_id}/{run_id}/.

contracts.name: node_checkpoint_validate_compute
contracts.description: COMPUTE node that performs pure structural validation on checkpoint data. Verifies schema version, required fields, path normalization, phase-payload consistency, and commit SHA format.  No filesystem I/O.

contracts.name: node_consumer_health_triage_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that consumes consumer health events from onex.evt.omnibase-infra.consumer-health.v1 and applies graduated triage response. First occurrence triggers Slack WARNING, second triggers Slack REPEATED, third in 30 minutes triggers restart command (gated by ENABLE_CONSUMER_AUTO_RESTART), restart failure triggers Linear ticket. Uses consumer_health_triage and consumer_restart_state PostgreSQL tables.

contracts.name: node_context_audit_dlq_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for context audit dead letter queue. Receives context audit events that failed normal processing for retry or manual investigation. Published by the omniclaude context audit pipeline.

contracts.name: node_contract_loader_effect
contracts.description: Contract loader effect node for scanning and discovering ONEX contract YAML files from the filesystem

contracts.name: node_contract_persistence_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for contract registry persistence. Routes intents from ContractRegistryReducer to PostgreSQL handlers for contract and topic management. Supports upsert, update, deactivate, and cleanup operations with circuit breaker protection and retry policies.

contracts.name: node_contract_registry_reducer
contracts.description:
Reducer node that consumes contract registration events from Kafka
and materializes them to Postgres for discovery and observability.

This reducer tracks:
- Contract registrations from nodes on startup
- Contract deregistrations for graceful shutdown
- Node heartbeats for liveness tracking and last_seen_at updates
- Runtime ticks for staleness computation (marking stale contracts inactive)

The reducer emits intents for PostgreSQL writes via the Effect layer,
following the pure reducer pattern where state changes and side effects
are separated.

contracts.name: node_contract_resolver_bridge
contracts.description: Transitional HTTP bridge that exposes the contract.resolve compute node (NodeContractResolveCompute) as a synchronous FastAPI service. Allows the dashboard (Node.js/Express) to resolve overlaid contracts via POST /api/nodes/contract.resolve without a Kafka round-trip. Emits onex.contract.resolve.completed to Kafka fire-and-forget for observability. Identical contract, events, and registry entry to the production node — only the execution path (HTTP vs. Kafka) changes in the transition.

contracts.name: node_contract_validate_compute
contracts.description: Compute node for ONEX contract validation and AST-based Pydantic model compliance scoring. Provides the runtime node boundary for the legacy ServiceContractValidator API while CI callers migrate.

contracts.name: node_db_error_linear_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that consumes PostgreSQL error events from onex.evt.omnibase-infra.db-error.v1 and creates Linear tickets for unique errors. Deduplication is performed via a db_error_tickets PostgreSQL table keyed on the error fingerprint. Repeat occurrences increment occurrence_count without creating duplicate tickets.

contracts.name: node_decision_store_effect
contracts.description: Two-stage effect node for decision store persistence. Stage 1 normalises and upserts the decision record into decision_store, committing independently of Stage 2. Stage 2 runs structural conflict detection against ACTIVE decisions in the same scope_domain + scope_layer, writing pairs >= 0.3 confidence to decision_conflicts and enforcing the ACTIVE invariant for pairs >= 0.9. Stage 2 failure never rolls back Stage 1. Supports two intent types: write_decision (two-stage) and write_conflict (idempotent pair insert). Contract patch 1 records handler-internal dataclass annotations only; runtime behavior, topics, payloads, and storage semantics are unchanged.

contracts.name: node_decision_store_query_compute
contracts.description: Compute node for cursor-paginated decision store queries. Supports filtering by domain, layer, decision_type, tags, epic_id, status, and scope_services (ANY/ALL/EXACT modes). Returns a paginated result with opaque cursor for stable page traversal under concurrent writes.

contracts.name: node_delta_bundle_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for delta bundle lifecycle tracking. Receives merge-gate-decision events (idempotent INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) and pr-outcome events (UPDATE with outcome, merged_at, bundle_completed_at). Detects fix-PRs via the stabilizes:<pr_ref> label convention and populates is_fix_pr and stabilizes_pr_ref fields accordingly.

contracts.name: node_delta_metrics_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for per-model performance metrics rollup. Subscribes to bundle completion signals from NodeDeltaBundleEffect and upserts aggregated counters into delta_metrics_by_model using ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE with incremented counters. Supports period-based rollups for dashboard visualization.

contracts.name: node_event_bus_wiring_effect
contracts.description: Event bus wiring effect node for ONEX runtime self-hosting architecture

contracts.name: node_event_forward_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that receives typed platform events (service lifecycle, system alerts, tool updates) and forwards them to a configurable HTTP backend endpoint.  Consolidates three archive handlers into one contract-driven node.

contracts.name: node_gmail_archive_cleanup_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that permanently deletes archived Gmail messages older than retention_days from each configured archive label. Triggered by onex.intent.platform.runtime-tick.v1. Emits a single summary event to onex.evt.omnibase-infra.gmail-archive-purged.v1 per run when any messages were deleted or errors occurred.

contracts.name: node_gmail_intent_poller_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that drains configured Gmail source labels on demand. For each message it applies an idempotency marker label, fetches the full message, extracts URLs, appends a gmail-intent-received event payload to pending_events, then archives the message. A recovery pass runs first to handle crashed mid-run states. Emits to onex.evt.omnibase_infra.gmail-intent-received.v1 with partition key = message_id.

contracts.name: node_impact_analyzer_compute
contracts.description: Pure compute node for artifact impact analysis. Takes a ModelUpdateTrigger and an artifact registry, matches changed files against source trigger patterns using fnmatch, applies the OMN-3925 scoring table (scope multiplier, policy floor, threshold-based action assignment), and returns a ModelImpactAnalysisResult with per-artifact scores and the highest merge policy. No external I/O.

contracts.name: node_invariant_evaluate_compute
contracts.description: Compute node for deterministic invariant evaluation against execution outputs. Preserves ReDoS protection and LRU schema validator caching inside a per-request evaluator so mutable caches are not shared across threads.

contracts.name: node_kafka_replay_compute
contracts.description: Compute node that replays Kafka event-bus envelopes from an explicitly injected target Kafka/Redpanda bootstrap for deterministic projection-equality proofs. The node never reads production bootstrap configuration or mutates runtime .201. Contract patch 1 records handler-internal dataclass annotations only; replay command, output, and transport semantics are unchanged.

contracts.name: node_ledger_projection_compute
contracts.description: COMPUTE node that subscribes to 7 platform event topics for event ledger persistence. Projects events from the platform event bus into the audit ledger, enabling complete traceability and debugging support. Uses consumer_purpose="audit" to indicate non-processing read-only consumption and auto_offset_reset="earliest" to capture all historical events.

contracts.name: node_ledger_write_effect
contracts.description: Capability-oriented effect node for event ledger write operations. Handles appending events to the PostgreSQL audit ledger with idempotent write support via unique constraint on (topic, partition, kafka_offset). Supports querying events by correlation ID, event type, topic, or time range.

contracts.name: node_llm_completion_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that sends chat completion requests to OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoints (vLLM, LiteLLM, Ollama). Supports model routing by token count and async streaming. Endpoint resolution is contract/config driven and requires LLM_CODER_URL when no provider endpoint is supplied.

contracts.name: node_llm_embedding_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for LLM embedding generation. Provides batch embedding generation via OpenAI-compatible endpoints with retry logic, circuit breaker protection, and dimension uniformity validation.

contracts.name: node_llm_inference_effect
contracts.description: LLM inference effect node for provider-agnostic inference operations. Delegates to provider-specific handlers (OpenAI-compatible, GLM, Gemini) via declarative operation routing. Supports chat completions and text completions with tool calling, generation parameters, structured response parsing, and optional GPU usage evidence for local-model compute attribution using the shared EnumUsageSource vocabulary.

contracts.name: node_merge_gate_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that subscribes to onex.evt.platform.merge-gate-decision.v1 events and upserts merge gate decisions into the merge_gate_decisions PostgreSQL table. Uses ON CONFLICT (pr_ref, head_sha) DO UPDATE for idempotent upserts. When decision is QUARANTINE, opens a Linear ticket with violation details. Emits no outbound events (side-effect only).

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_auto_merge_effect
contracts.description: Arms GitHub auto-merge and enqueues PRs into the merge queue.

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_classify_compute
contracts.description: Classifies PRs into Track A (auto-merge ready) and Track B (needs polish).

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_pr_list_effect
contracts.description: Lists open PRs across GitHub repositories and emits PR metadata.

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_workflow_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates the merge-sweep workflow: receive command, dispatch PR scan, dispatch classification, dispatch auto-merge, emit completion event.

contracts.name: node_merge_sweep_workflow_reducer
contracts.description: FSM-based state tracking for the merge-sweep workflow.

contracts.name: node_model_health_effect
contracts.description: Probes model endpoints for health, latency, and queue depth.

contracts.name: node_model_router_compute
contracts.description: Pure scoring of candidate models by quality, measured cost tier, live speed metrics, and availability.

contracts.name: node_node_graph_reducer
contracts.description: Node graph lifecycle reducer using FSM pattern for ONEX runtime self-hosting

contracts.name: node_onboarding_orchestrator
contracts.description: Onboarding orchestrator — supports two execution paths. DAG path (default): loads the canonical graph, resolves a policy to a minimal verification step set, executes verification for each step, and renders markdown output. Interactive path (OMN-10784): when policy_name is set and the resolved policy has policy_type=interactive, dispatches to InteractiveExecutor with an injected input adapter, optionally writing env config via ConfigWriter when dry_run=False. Emits lifecycle events on completion. No result field (Invariant I5). Overlay output path support (OMN-11069): interactive onboarding writes overlay YAML as the primary output and can optionally emit the legacy env file.

contracts.name: node_pattern_lifecycle_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for pattern lifecycle tier management. Applies validation verdicts (PASS, FAIL, QUARANTINE) to pattern lifecycle state and computes tier transitions. Promotion tiers: OBSERVED -> SUGGESTED -> SHADOW_APPLY -> PROMOTED -> DEFAULT. Auto-rollback: 2 consecutive FAILs demote one tier, 3 consecutive FAILs suppress the pattern.

contracts.name: node_registration_orchestrator
contracts.description: Registration workflow orchestrator that coordinates node lifecycle by calling reducer for intents and effect for execution. Contract patch 1 records handler-internal dataclass annotations only; workflow, topics, and payload semantics are unchanged.

contracts.name: node_registration_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer for node registration workflow - processes introspection events and emits registration intents for PostgreSQL backend.

contracts.name: node_registration_storage_effect
contracts.description: Capability-oriented effect node for registration storage operations. Handles store, query, update, and delete operations for node registrations with pluggable backend handlers (e.g., PostgreSQL).

contracts.name: node_registry_api_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node wrapping the Registry Discovery API. Provides contract-driven configuration for the FastAPI service that exposes node registrations and live service instances for dashboard consumption. Combines data from PostgreSQL projections and Consul service discovery with partial-success semantics. All operational limits, paths, and behaviour are defined here rather than as hardcoded constants.

contracts.name: node_registry_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for PostgreSQL-backed node registration. Consul service discovery was decommissioned (OMN-4857). Executes registration operations against PostgreSQL (registration record persistence), with support for partial failure handling and targeted retries. Uses declarative operation routing to dispatch to backend-specific handlers.

contracts.name: node_routing_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates the model routing workflow: receive command, dispatch health probe, dispatch scoring, emit routing decision.

contracts.name: node_routing_score_reducer
contracts.description: Tracks model capability scores, graduation state, and cost per model over time.

contracts.name: node_row_count_diagnostic_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for database row count diagnostic emission. Publishes periodic row count snapshots from projection tables via the event bus. Currently implemented as a probe-based emitter; full ONEX node conversion is deferred.

contracts.name: node_rrh_emit_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that collects environment data for Release Readiness Handshake (RRH) validation.  Three handlers gather independent data dimensions: repository git state, deployment runtime targets, and build-toolchain versions.  The composite output feeds into node_rrh_validate_compute.

contracts.name: node_rrh_storage_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that persists RRH validation results as timestamped JSON artifacts and maintains convenience symlinks for quick lookup by ticket and repository.

contracts.name: node_rrh_validate_compute
contracts.description: Pure COMPUTE node for Release Readiness Handshake validation. Evaluates 13 rules (RRH-1001 through RRH-1701) against collected environment data using profile-driven severity and contract tightening. No I/O — deterministic input-to-output transformation.

contracts.name: node_rsd_data_fetch_effect
contracts.description: Fetches ticket data, dependency graphs, agent requests, and plan overrides from Linear API or DB for RSD scoring.

contracts.name: node_rsd_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates the RSD priority scoring workflow: receive command, dispatch data fetch, dispatch score computation, dispatch state storage, emit completion event.

contracts.name: node_rsd_score_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: calculates RSD 5-factor priority scores. Factors: dependency distance (40%), failure surface (25%), time decay (15%), agent utility (10%), user weighting (10%). Time decay normalizes naive created_at timestamps to UTC before age arithmetic. No I/O - all data provided as input.

contracts.name: node_rsd_state_reducer
contracts.description: FSM-based state tracking for the RSD priority scoring workflow.

contracts.name: node_runner_health_snapshot_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for runner health snapshot emission. Publishes periodic health snapshots from GitHub Actions runners via the event bus. Currently implemented as a CLI-based emitter; full ONEX node conversion is tracked by OMN-6091.

contracts.name: node_runner_usage_effect
contracts.description: Consumes self-hosted GitHub Actions runner usage events, computes avoided GitHub-hosted runner cost using the pricing manifest, and emits SAVINGS_ESTIMATED payloads for the savings projection.

contracts.name: node_runtime_error_triage_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that consumes runtime error events from onex.evt.omnibase-infra.runtime-error.v1 and applies first-match-wins triage. Default rules cover aiokafka, asyncpg, and aiohttp patterns. Includes cross-layer correlation with Layer 1 consumer health incidents. Uses runtime_error_triage PostgreSQL table.

contracts.name: node_runtime_manifest_reducer
contracts.description: Append-only reducer that persists runtime manifests to PostgreSQL. Receives runtime-manifest-published events and inserts one row per startup into runtime_manifests.

contracts.name: node_runtime_orchestrator
contracts.description: Self-hosted ONEX runtime orchestrator using 4-node architecture

contracts.name: node_runtime_source_attestor_effect
contracts.description: Effect node that subscribes to onex.evt.runtime.booted.v1 and verifies runtime_source_hash against the current main HEAD for each repo via git ls-remote. On drift exceeding the configured threshold (default 5 commits), emits a friction event to .onex_state/friction/ and flags the container for the morning-report surface. On unknown or empty hash, treats as infinite drift (always alert). Integrates with OMN-9122 runtime_sweep.

contracts.name: node_savings_estimation_compute
contracts.description: Compute node for token savings estimation. Takes injection effectiveness data (utilization scores, pattern counts, tokens saved per session) and computes cost savings using tiered model pricing (Opus $15/M input, Sonnet $3/M input). Produces a ModelSavingsEstimate for Kafka emission to onex.evt.omnibase-infra.savings-estimated.v1.

contracts.name: node_scope_extract_compute
contracts.description: Pure computation: extracts scope items (files, directories, repos, systems) from plan content.

contracts.name: node_scope_file_read_effect
contracts.description: Reads a plan file from the filesystem and emits its content.

contracts.name: node_scope_manifest_write_effect
contracts.description: Writes the scope manifest JSON file to disk.

contracts.name: node_scope_workflow_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrates the scope-check workflow: receive command, dispatch file read, dispatch scope extraction, dispatch manifest write, emit completion event.

contracts.name: node_scope_workflow_reducer
contracts.description: FSM-based state tracking for the scope-check workflow.

contracts.name: node_service_discovery_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for service discovery operations. Provides capability-oriented service registration, deregistration, and discovery with pluggable backend support (Consul, Kubernetes, Etcd). Named by capability, not vendor.

contracts.name: node_session_lifecycle_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer for session lifecycle management. Tracks the FSM idle -> run_created -> run_active -> run_ended for each pipeline run. Emits intents for session index and run context writes. Supports concurrent pipeline isolation via per-run FSM instances.

contracts.name: node_session_state_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for session state filesystem I/O. Owns all reads/writes to ~/.claude/state/ including session.json (with flock) and runs/{run_id}.json. Uses atomic write-tmp-fsync-rename pattern for crash safety. Supports concurrent pipeline isolation via per-run documents and stale run GC.

contracts.name: node_setup_infisical_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node that bootstraps the Infisical secret store by running provision-infisical.py (identity setup) and seed-infisical.py (secret population) in sequence. Part of the setup orchestration workflow.

contracts.name: node_setup_local_provision_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node that provisions, tears down, and checks status of local Docker Compose services defined in a ModelDeploymentTopology. Runs docker compose up -d (provision), docker compose down (teardown), and docker compose ps (status). Deduplicates --profile flags across services sharing the same profile. Async-polls ports until healthy or max_wait_seconds is exceeded.

contracts.name: node_setup_orchestrator
contracts.description: ORCHESTRATOR node that coordinates the full platform setup workflow: cloud gate check (I8) → preflight validation → local Docker Compose provisioning → Infisical bootstrap → post-provision health validation. Emits a structured sequence of lifecycle events (SETUP_EVENT_TYPES). No result field — orchestrators emit events only (Invariant I5).

contracts.name: node_setup_preflight_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node that validates all prerequisites before platform provisioning. Checks Docker version, Compose version, Python version, POSTGRES_PASSWORD env var, Docker daemon status, omnibase directory, and local service port availability.

contracts.name: node_setup_validate_effect
contracts.description: EFFECT node that validates TCP/HTTP health for all LOCAL-mode services in the deployment topology after provisioning is complete. Services with a health_check_path use HTTP GET; others use TCP connect.

contracts.name: node_slack_alerter_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for Slack alerting. Sends infrastructure alerts to Slack channels using the Web API (chat.postMessage with threading support), with Block Kit formatting, retry with exponential backoff, and rate limit handling. Uses declarative operation routing to dispatch to the HandlerSlackWebhook.

contracts.name: node_update_plan_reducer
contracts.description: Pure reducer for artifact update plan lifecycle management. Tracks the FSM idle -> created -> comment_posted -> yaml_emitted -> closed (or waived) for each impact analysis event. Emits intents for PR comment posting and YAML plan emission. Translates ModelImpactAnalysisResult into ModelUpdatePlan with deterministic task_type assignment.

contracts.name: node_validation_adjudicator
contracts.description: Pure reducer for validation verdict production. Aggregates check results from the validation executor, applies scoring policy (required/recommended/informational severity), and produces a PASS/FAIL/QUARANTINE verdict. Supports the collecting -> adjudicating -> verdict_emitted FSM lifecycle with reset capability.

contracts.name: node_validation_executor
contracts.description: Effect node for running validation checks against a candidate. Receives a ModelValidationPlan and executes each planned check (typecheck, lint, unit tests, integration tests, risk assessment, cost measurement). Each check produces a ModelCheckResult. Results are aggregated into a ModelExecutorResult.

contracts.name: node_validation_ledger_projection_compute
contracts.description: COMPUTE node that subscribes to 3 cross-repo validation event topics for validation ledger persistence. Projects validation events into the validation_event_ledger for deterministic replay. Uses consumer_purpose="projection" and auto_offset_reset="earliest" to capture all historical validation events.

contracts.name: node_validation_orchestrator
contracts.description: Orchestrator for the validation pipeline. Consumes pattern candidates, builds validation plans with the MVP check catalog, coordinates executor and adjudicator nodes, and publishes validation results. Drives the build_plan -> execute_checks -> adjudicate -> update_lifecycle workflow.

contracts.name: node_vector_store_effect
contracts.description: Effect node for vector database operations: store documents with embeddings, search by similarity, and manage collections.  Backed by Qdrant.

contracts.name: node_waste_detection_compute
contracts.description: Session-windowed compute node that analyzes LLM call telemetry for cost waste and emits waste-detected events for projection into waste_findings.
